allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f''''ID:{w.get\(id\)}\\n  title: {w.get\(title,\)[:60]}\\n  fadeText: {str\(w.get\(fadeText,\)\)[:60]}\\n  type: {w.get\(type\)}\\n  tags: {w.get\(tags,[]\)}''''\) for w in data.get\(''''works'''',[]\)]")

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:4321/work" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; "LEN: $\($r.Content.Length\)"; if \($r.Content -match 'work-row'\) { "OK: rows rendered" }; if \($r.Content -match 'filter'\) { "OK: filters" } } catch { "ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:4321/about" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; "LEN: $\($r.Content.Length\)"; foreach \($m in 'career-row','stack-col','story-quote','stat'\) { if \($r.Content -match $m\) { "OK: $m" } else { "MISS: $m" } } } catch { "ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(foreach \($u in '/templates','/templates/stratus','/templates/forge'\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:4321$u" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "$u -> STATUS $\($r.StatusCode\), LEN $\($r.Content.Length\)" } catch { "$u -> ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell($h = Get-Content "c:\\Users\\Dread\\Documents\\Documentos Fabs\\Projects\\portfolio_astro_deno\\frontend\\.vercel\\output\\static\\index.html" -Raw; $iStage = $h.IndexOf\('hero-stage'\); $iHero = $h.IndexOf\('class="hero'\); $iDevice = $h.IndexOf\('class="stage'\); "hero-stage@$iStage"; "hero@$iHero"; "device-stage@$iDevice"; if \($iStage -lt $iHero -and $iHero -lt $iDevice\) { "OK: <hero-stage> wraps Hero+Device in order" })

PowerShell(cd "c:\\Users\\Dread\\Documents\\Documentos Fabs\\Projects\\portfolio_astro_deno\\frontend"; npm run build 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 10; "---"; "Routes:"; Get-ChildItem ".vercel\\output\\static\\templates" -Directory | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name; "---"; $g = Get-Content ".vercel\\output\\static\\templates\\index.html" -Raw; "Gallery iframes: $\(\([regex]::Matches\($g,'<iframe'\)\).Count\)"; if \($g -match 'src="/templates/mirante"'\) { "OK: mirante in gallery" }; if \($g -notmatch 'nucleo'\) { "OK: nucleo removed" }; $m = Get-Content ".vercel\\output\\static\\templates\\mirante\\index.html" -Raw; "Mirante LEN: $\($m.Length\)"; foreach \($k in 'Pinheiros','Cardeal Arcoverde','CRECI','Tipologia','Faria Lima','contextmenu','keydown'\) { if \($m -match $k\) { "OK: $k" } else { "MISS: $k" } })

PowerShell(cd "c:\\Users\\Dread\\Documents\\Documentos Fabs\\Projects\\portfolio_astro_deno\\frontend"; npm run build 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 5; "---"; $idx = Get-Content ".vercel\\output\\static\\index.html" -Raw; foreach \($s in 'Observability npm for Node','plugs into pino','C# version','flow-based automations','Calendar, CRMs'\) { if \($idx -match [regex]::Escape\($s\)\) { "OK: $s" } else { "MISS: $s" } })

PowerShell(cd "c:\\Users\\Dread\\Documents\\Documentos Fabs\\Projects\\portfolio_astro_deno\\frontend"; npm run build 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 4; "---"; $a = Get-Content ".vercel\\output\\static\\about\\index.html" -Raw; "Col 3 title \(was 'Add AI'\):"; if \($a -match 'Integrate AI'\) { "  OK: Integrate AI" } else { "  MISS" }; "Build bullets \(EN defaults in HTML\):"; foreach \($b in 'High-converting landing pages','Institutional sites','Web systems','Cloud-native, ready to scale'\) { if \($a -match [regex]::Escape\($b\)\) { "  OK: $b" } else { "  MISS: $b" } }; "Old bullets should be gone:"; foreach \($b in 'New systems, from idea','Web platforms, SaaS, e-commerce','Backends, APIs and queues','Frontends in React'\) { if \($a -notmatch [regex]::Escape\($b\)\) { "  OK gone: $b" } else { "  WARN still: $b" } })

PowerShell(cd "c:\\Users\\Dread\\Documents\\Documentos Fabs\\Projects\\portfolio_astro_deno\\frontend"; npm run build 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern 'error|Error|fail|warn' -CaseSensitive:$false | Select-Object -Last 8; "---"; "Build status:"; if \($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0\) { "  OK" } else { "  failed" }; "---"; "Rotas geradas:"; Get-ChildItem ".vercel\\output\\static" -Recurse -Filter "index.html" | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName.Replace\(\(Resolve-Path ".vercel\\output\\static"\).Path,''\).Replace\('\\','/'\).Replace\('/index.html','/'\) })

PowerShell(cd "c:\\Users\\Dread\\Documents\\Documentos Fabs\\Projects\\portfolio_astro_deno\\frontend"; npm run build 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 8; "---"; "Runtime no .vc-config.json:"; if \(Test-Path ".vercel\\output\\functions\\_render.func\\.vc-config.json"\) { \(Get-Content ".vercel\\output\\functions\\_render.func\\.vc-config.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json\).runtime } elseif \(Test-Path "..\\..\\_functions\\entry.mjs"\) { "diferente local" } else { "ver outro path"; Get-ChildItem ".vercel\\output\\functions" -Recurse -Filter ".vc-config.json" | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.FullName\):"; Get-Content $_.FullName } })

PowerShell(cd "c:\\Users\\Dread\\Documents\\Documentos Fabs\\Projects\\portfolio_astro_deno\\frontend"; npm install astro@^4.16.0 @astrojs/vercel@^7.8.0 @astrojs/check@^0.9.0 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 5; "---"; "Versions:"; \(Get-Content package.json -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json\).dependencies.PSObject.Properties | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'astro' } | ForEach-Object { "  $\($_.Name\): $\($_.Value\)" })
